item.title: Deep Sky
item.description:
Wednesday, March 4, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

Deep Sky brings the awe-inspiring images captured by NASA’s JWST to IMAX® — taking audiences on a journey to the beginning of time and space.

Event details

item.title: Wild Rescue 2D
item.description:
Wednesday, March 4, 2026 at 11:45 AM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

Based on the work at the Santa Barbara Wildlife Care Network, Wild Rescue follows the teams who rescue and rehabilitate injured wild animals.

Event details

item.title: T. Rex 2D
item.description:
Wednesday, March 4, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

Experience the ultimate G.O.A.T. — Greatest of All Tyrants — as it roars to life on the giant screen in the film, T. rex.

Event details

item.title: Blue Whales: Return of the Giants
item.description:
Wednesday, March 4, 2026 at 2:10 PM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

Award-winning actor, Andy Serkis, narrates this stunning IMAX film that brings the world’s largest animal to the world’s largest screen.

Event details

item.title: Deep Sky
item.description:
Wednesday, March 4, 2026 at 3:20 PM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

Deep Sky brings the awe-inspiring images captured by NASA’s JWST to IMAX® — taking audiences on a journey to the beginning of time and space.

Event details

item.title: Scream 7
item.description:
Wednesday, March 4, 2026 at 4:30 PM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

When a new Ghostface killer emerges where Sidney Prescott has built a new life, her darkest fears are realized as her daughter becomes the next target.

Event details

item.title: Scream 7
item.description:
Wednesday, March 4, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

When a new Ghostface killer emerges where Sidney Prescott has built a new life, her darkest fears are realized as her daughter becomes the next target.

Event details

item.title: Into America’s Wild 2D
item.description:
Thursday, March 5, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

Into America’s Wild is a non-stop ride that explores the transformational allure of wild places and the human connection we all share with the natural world.

Event details

item.title: Space: The New Frontier
item.description:
Thursday, March 5, 2026 at 11:45 AM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

NASA and international space agencies push the boundaries of space exploration, expanding scientific and engineering limits to enhance life on Earth.

Event details

item.description:
Thursday, March 5, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

Event details

item.title: Arctic: Our Frozen Planet
item.description:
Friday, March 6, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

Arctic: Our Frozen Planet is an epic adventure across the magical realm of snow and ice at the top of our planet.

Event details

item.title: Hoppers
item.description:
Friday, March 6, 2026 at 4:30 PM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

In Disney and Pixar’s all-new feature film Hoppers, scientists have discovered how to “hop” human consciousness into lifelike robotic animals.

Event details

item.title: The Bride!
item.description:
Friday, March 6, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

From Maggie Gyllenhaal and starring Jessie Buckley and Christian Bale comes a bold take on one of the world’s most compelling stories.

Event details

Thursday, March 12, 2026 at 4:30 PM

item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 7:30 PM
